prestazioni: Replace the original 1.6L IOE (Inlet-Over-Exhaust) F-head engine (engine code: 16UA) with a fully built 2.2L Rover K-Series KV6 (engine code: KV6 2.5L, stroked to 2.2L) using a custom bellhousing adapter from RPI Engineering, paired with a Quaife ATB differential and a Tremec T56 6-speed manual transmission with a custom hydraulic clutch system by Tilton Engineering

Install a custom forced-induction system featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing, custom stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed, and a front-mounted air-to-air intercooler from Bell Auto Services, tuned via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom fuel maps for 98 RON fuel and E85 compatibility

Upgrade the braking system with AP Racing CP5270 front calipers (4-piston) and CP5271 rear calipers (2-piston), paired with 280mm vented rotors from HiSpec Motorsport, along with braided stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for off-road endurance
estetica: Replace the original steel body panels with lightweight aluminum replica panels from JE Engineering, featuring a custom matte military green powder-coated finish with a clear ceramic topcoat by Bodyteq for corrosion resistance

Install a custom off-road aero kit by JGS 4x4, including a reinforced front bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 10-S winch, a rear swing-out tire carrier with dual jerry can mounts, and a roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters with a 50-inch LED light bar from Rigid Industries

Upgrade the interior with a full custom roll cage by Safety Devices, Recaro SRD-E bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum dashboard with VDO gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and a Race Technology DL1 data logger
